fewShots.question: Show all patients with their full name, date of birth, and gender
fewShots.query: SELECT idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(name_string, '$[0].given[1]') AS middle_name, JSON_VALUE(name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, birthDate, gender FROM dbo.Patient

fewShots.question: List all patients with their full name, city, state, and phone number
fewShots.query: SELECT idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, gender, JSON_VALUE(address_string, '$[0].city') AS city, JSON_VALUE(address_string, '$[0].state') AS state, JSON_VALUE(telecom_string, '$[0].value') AS phone FROM dbo.Patient

fewShots.question: Show patients who have had an MRI and their full names
fewShots.query: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, ims.started AS imaging_date, ims.description FROM dbo.ImagingStudy ims CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(ims.series_string) WITH (modality_code NVARCHAR(10) '$.modality.code') AS s JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(ims.subject_string, '$.identifier.value') = p.idOrig WHERE s.modality_code = 'MR'

fewShots.question: Show me the names of all patients who have had an MRI
fewShots.query: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, ims.started AS imaging_date, ims.description FROM dbo.ImagingStudy ims CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(ims.series_string) WITH (modality_code NVARCHAR(10) '$.modality.code') AS s JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(ims.subject_string, '$.identifier.value') = p.idOrig WHERE s.modality_code = 'MR'

fewShots.question: Find patients who have CT imaging with their name and imaging date
fewShots.query: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, ims.started AS imaging_date, ims.description FROM dbo.ImagingStudy ims CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(ims.series_string) WITH (modality_code NVARCHAR(10) '$.modality.code') AS s JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(ims.subject_string, '$.identifier.value') = p.idOrig WHERE s.modality_code = 'CT'

fewShots.question: List all conditions with their clinical status and patient name
fewShots.query: SELECT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS condition_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.clinicalStatus_string, '$.coding[0].code') AS clinical_status, fc.recordedDate FROM dbo.Condition fc JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(fc.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig

fewShots.question: Find all patients diagnosed with diabetes and show their names
fewShots.query: SELECT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS condition_name, fc.onsetDateTime, fc.recordedDate FROM dbo.Condition fc JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(fc.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE fc.code_string LIKE '%diabetes%'

fewShots.question: Show all allergies with patient name and criticality
fewShots.query: SELECT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(ai.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS allergy, ai.criticality, JSON_VALUE(ai.clinicalStatus_string, '$.coding[0].code') AS clinical_status FROM dbo.AllergyIntolerance ai JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(ai.patient_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig

fewShots.question: List imaging studies with patient name and modality
fewShots.query: SELECT DISTINCT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, ims.started, s.modality_code AS modality, ims.numberOfSeries, ims.numberOfInstances, ims.description FROM dbo.ImagingStudy ims CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(ims.series_string) WITH (modality_code NVARCHAR(10) '$.modality.code') AS s JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(ims.subject_string, '$.identifier.value') = p.idOrig

fewShots.question: Show radiology diagnostic reports with patient name and report conclusion
fewShots.query: SELECT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, dr.conclusion, JSON_VALUE(dr.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS report_type, dr.effectiveDateTime FROM dbo.DiagnosticReport dr JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(dr.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE dr.imagingStudy_string IS NOT NULL

fewShots.question: List all medications with patient name and medication details
fewShots.query: SELECT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(mr.medicationCodeableConcept_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS medication, mr.status, mr.authoredOn FROM dbo.MedicationRequest mr JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(mr.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig

fewShots.question: Show the full names of all patients who have a MedicationRequest for lisinopril
fewShots.query: SELECT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(mr.medicationCodeableConcept_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS medication, mr.status, mr.authoredOn FROM dbo.MedicationRequest mr JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(mr.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE mr.medicationCodeableConcept_string LIKE '%lisinopril%'

fewShots.question: Find patients on metformin and show their names
fewShots.query: SELECT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(mr.medicationCodeableConcept_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS medication, mr.status, mr.authoredOn FROM dbo.MedicationRequest mr JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(mr.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE mr.medicationCodeableConcept_string LIKE '%metformin%'

fewShots.question: Find all female patients over 65 with their conditions and severity
fewShots.query: SELECT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, p.gender, DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birthDate, GETDATE()) AS age, JSON_VALUE(fc.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS condition_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.severity_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS severity FROM dbo.Patient p LEFT JOIN dbo.Condition fc ON JSON_VALUE(fc.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE p.gender = 'female' AND DATEDIFF(YEAR, p.birthDate, GETDATE()) > 65

fewShots.question: Show patients with cancer conditions including staging information
fewShots.query: SELECT p.idOrig AS patient_id, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS condition_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.stage_string, '$.summary.coding[0].display') AS stage, JSON_VALUE(fc.clinicalStatus_string, '$.coding[0].code') AS clinical_status, JSON_VALUE(fc.severity_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS severity FROM dbo.Condition fc JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(fc.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE fc.code_string LIKE '%cancer%'

fewShots.question: Find patients with a condition who also have CT imaging
fewShots.query: SELECT DISTINCT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(fc.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS condition_name, ims.started AS imaging_date, ims.description FROM dbo.Patient p JOIN dbo.Condition fc ON JSON_VALUE(fc.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig JOIN dbo.ImagingStudy ims ON JSON_VALUE(ims.subject_string, '$.identifier.value') = p.idOrig CROSS APPLY OPENJSON(ims.series_string) WITH (modality_code NVARCHAR(10) '$.modality.code') AS s WHERE s.modality_code = 'CT'

fewShots.question: List deceased patients with their name and date of death
fewShots.query: SELECT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, p.deceasedDateTime, p.gender, p.birthDate FROM dbo.Patient p WHERE p.deceasedBoolean = 'true' OR p.deceasedDateTime IS NOT NULL

fewShots.question: Show patients with encounters including visit type and dates
fewShots.query: SELECT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(enc.class_string, '$.code') AS encounter_class, JSON_VALUE(enc.type_string, '$[0].coding[0].display') AS encounter_type, JSON_VALUE(enc.period_string, '$.start') AS visit_start, JSON_VALUE(enc.period_string, '$.end') AS visit_end FROM dbo.Encounter enc JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(enc.subject_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig

fewShots.question: How many patients do we have broken down by gender
fewShots.query: SELECT gender, COUNT(*) AS patient_count FROM dbo.Patient GROUP BY gender ORDER BY patient_count DESC

fewShots.question: Find patients allergic to penicillin with their name and criticality
fewShots.query: SELECT JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].given[0]') AS first_name, JSON_VALUE(p.name_string, '$[0].family') AS last_name, JSON_VALUE(ai.code_string, '$.coding[0].display') AS allergy, ai.criticality FROM dbo.AllergyIntolerance ai JOIN dbo.Patient p ON JSON_VALUE(ai.patient_string, '$.idOrig') = p.idOrig WHERE ai.code_string LIKE '%penicillin%'
